falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is considered falsified if the pre-registered empirical test shows the opposite direction of the claim at conventional significance (p > 0.10), or if the primary outcome measure moves less than 10% in the claimed direction across the sample. Exact thresholds will be pinned in the variables and estimator blocks when this stub is promoted from draft.
falsification_test_text: Compare 1990-2019 average annual real value-added growth in steel/energy/telecoms between Chinese SOEs and CEE post-privatisation peers (UNIDO + national statistics). Refute if CHN SOE growth not statistically faster than CEE-cohort median at p<0.10.

variables_loaded.name: china_soe_strategic_sector_indicator
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 for CHN; 0 for CEE/post-Soviet privatised peers (POL, CZE, HUN, SVK, RUS, UKR, ROU, BGR). Strategic-sector subset = ISIC C24 (basic metals) + D35 (electricity, gas) + J61 (telecoms) where disaggregated data permit.
